options.name: --exclude
options.description:
(Default: bin obj logs node_modules) Specify explicit
directories to exclude. Overrides the default.

options.description: Specify the level of output (silent, default, verbose)

options.description:
Specify the style of output (compressed, compact, nested,
expanded)
